props.ChoiceText: Mercy toward someone the crowd wanted crushed taught you how quickly compassion can resemble faction when office is involved.
props.ChoiceBio: Protecting a sinner taught you that mercy gathers witnesses faster than punishment does.

0.TargetText: The spared soul, or someone tied to them, still remembers the shelter you provided.
0.TransitionText: Because protecting a sinner taught you that mercy gathers witnesses faster than punishment does, church office remained your daily craft.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Prelate, but you may remain on your current path instead.

0.TargetText: Someone in lower clergy still believes you may choose mercy again when it matters.
